docs:
# Starfield
Twinkling star field for dark hero backgrounds and launch pages.
## Import
```tsx
import { StarfieldBackground } from "@/components/ui/starfield-background";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<StarfieldBackground count={80} color="#ffffff" speed={1} count={80} color="#ffffff" />
```
## Props
- **count** (number) — default: `80`: Star count
- **color** (string) — default: `"#ffffff"`: Color
- **speed** (number) — default: `1`: Speed
- **count** (number) — default: `80`: Dot count
- **color** (string) — default: `"#ffffff"`: Color
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add starfield-background
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/starfield-background
```
